target_description: Single-machine daemon linking AI coding agents through a shared Graphify-powered knowledge graph. Filesystem inbox protocol (no SDK/auth), Next.js dashboard control plane, per-project isolation, SQLite registry.
target_stack: Python FastAPI daemon + Next.js 15 dashboard + Graphify knowledge graph + SQLite + WebSocket

direct_competitors.name: Cognee
direct_competitors.description: Open-source agent memory platform. Build persistent memory across sessions with graph, vector, and relational retrieval. Self-hosted, Docker, on-prem, or cloud.
direct_competitors.similarity: HIGH — graph-based agent memory, open-source, self-hosted, multi-modal retrieval
direct_competitors.differentiator: Cloud-native, pipeline-based ingestion, broader scope (not code-specific)

direct_competitors.name: Graphiti (by Zep)
direct_competitors.description: Build real-time knowledge graphs for AI agents. Temporal knowledge graph that updates as agents learn.
direct_competitors.similarity: HIGH — knowledge graph for agents, real-time updates, open-source
direct_competitors.differentiator: Temporal graph model, cloud-native, not filesystem-protocol-based

direct_competitors.name: Mem0
direct_competitors.description: AI memory layer for agents and apps. Continuously learns from past interactions for personalization.
direct_competitors.similarity: MEDIUM — persistent agent memory, but focuses on user personalization, not code knowledge graphs

direct_competitors.name: Letta (formerly MemGPT)
direct_competitors.description: Stateful agents that remember everything, learn continuously, and improve over time. OS-inspired tiered memory.
direct_competitors.similarity: MEDIUM — OS-inspired memory architecture, stateful agents, but focuses on chat/LLM memory not code graph

direct_competitors.name: LangMem (LangChain)
direct_competitors.description: Memory framework for LangChain agents. Part of the LangChain ecosystem.
direct_competitors.similarity: MEDIUM — memory for agents, but tightly coupled to LangChain, not standalone
direct_competitors.differentiator: LangChain-only, no dashboard, framework not platform

direct_competitors.name: Cloudflare Agent Memory
direct_competitors.description: Stateful AI agents with persistent memory, WebSocket, scheduled tasks. Cloudflare SDK.
direct_competitors.similarity: MEDIUM — persistent memory, WebSocket, but cloud-only, not self-hosted daemon
direct_competitors.differentiator: Cloud-only, no local filesystem protocol, no code knowledge graph

direct_competitors.name: MCP Memory Server
direct_competitors.description: Official MCP server providing knowledge graph-based persistent memory system.
direct_competitors.similarity: MEDIUM — knowledge graph memory, filesystem-backed, but requires MCP client

direct_competitors.name: OpenClaw
direct_competitors.description: Open-source agent with heartbeat/soul/memory configuration. Memory wiki plugin. Filesystem-based.
direct_competitors.similarity: MEDIUM — filesystem-based config, heartbeat protocol, memory wiki, but an agent not a daemon
direct_competitors.differentiator: Self-contained agent, not a multi-agent memory fabric

adjacent_competitors.name: Claude Code Sub-agents
adjacent_competitors.description: Hierarchical delegation: Claude Code spawns focused sub-agents. No shared knowledge graph between them.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Proves the multi-agent pattern works. Agentic OS adds the shared memory layer Claude Code lacks.

adjacent_competitors.name: GitHub Spec Kit
adjacent_competitors.description: Spec-driven agent coding. Generate specs, then delegate implementation to coding agents.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Task decomposition pattern. Agentic OS could ingest spec-kit outputs as agent findings.

adjacent_competitors.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
adjacent_competitors.description: OpenAI's coding agent with delegation capabilities.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Another agent that could register with Agentic OS via the inbox protocol.

adjacent_competitors.name: Swarms (kyegomez)
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Proves multi-agent pattern. No shared knowledge graph. Agentic OS adds the memory layer.

adjacent_competitors.name: Agno
adjacent_competitors.description: Build, run, and manage agent platforms.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Management plane for agents, but broader scope. Agentic OS is more focused on code knowledge.

adjacent_competitors.name: Braintrust
adjacent_competitors.description: AI observability platform for tracing, evals, regression catching.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Shows the observability need Agentic OS addresses with WebSocket + dashboard.

adjacent_competitors.name: Hermes Agent
adjacent_competitors.description: Full agent platform with delegation, kanban task board, skills, memory, cron. Has a control plane dashboard.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Closest to a full control plane. Agentic OS is the multi-agent memory fabric Hermes agents could connect to.

adjacent_competitors.name: LangGraph Studio
adjacent_competitors.description: Visual debugging and monitoring for LangGraph agents.
adjacent_competitors.relevance: Shows the visualization need Agentic OS addresses with Cytoscape.js graph explorer.
